response.overview: For years, Royal Challengers Bangalore weren’t chasing a trophy, they were carrying a wound.  Every season ended the same way: close enough to taste it, far enough to lose it.  Doubt grew louder. The world stopped believing.  But pressure does one of two things. It breaks you…or it forges you into something unstoppable.  Now, under the brightest lights, with years of failure behind them and nothing left to lose, RCB step onto the field not as contenders but as a storm that’s been building for too long.  This isn’t just a final.  It’s a reckoning.  And when the fire finally meets the night—only one story will survive.
response.title: IPL 2025: RCB - The Rise
